name: JOKER-MD-BOT
description: A powerful, feature-rich WhatsApp user bot built with the Baileys library.

SESSION_ID.description: Put your Joker pairing session credentials or session ID folder here.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your main WhatsApp number with country code (e.g., 911234567890). Do not add '+' or '-' spaces.

BOT_NAME.description: The custom name of your JOKER bot.

OWNER_NAME.description: Your custom name/handle displayed across the system panels.

MODE.description: Set whether the bot operates publicly or listens to you privately.
